description: Object.prototype.toString brands TypedArray/ArrayBuffer/DataView/Promise/BigInt/Symbol correctly under wasm32-wasi (short-circuit before the toStringTag probe that segfaults native / mislabels or traps wasm; BigInt/Symbol ruled out first to avoid value-byte collisions)

[object Int16Array]

[object Int32Array]
[object Uint32Array]

[object Float64Array]

[object Promise]

[object BigInt]
[object BigInt]
[object Symbol]
